# Edge Cases

## Empty Code Block

```
```

## Unknown Language

```brainfuck
+++++[>++++++++<-]>.
```

## Massive Table

| A | B | C | D |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | 2 | 3 | 4 |
| 5 | 6 | 7 | 8 |

## Escaped Markdown

\*not italic\*

## Inline HTML

<span data-test="true">Inline HTML content</span>

## Mixed Ordered Lists

1. One
2. Two
    - Nested bullet
    - Nested bullet
3. Three
